creator: Taha
hook: I tested Claude Fable 5 against the new GPT-5.6 Sol. This is the CORRECT way to use them:

lead_magnet.name: Fable 5 vs GPT-5.6 Sol: The Cold Email Guide

source_signal: Model-launch news cycle: GPT-5.6 Sol (OpenAI) hit GA July 9 2026, Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic) June 9. Rode it for a cold-email angle.
notes: Comparison / lead-magnet post. Thesis: don't pick one, run Fable 5 as the manager (strategy + QA) and Sol as the worker (volume writing). Backed by a deep-research build: 100+ agents across 20+ sources with claims tiered (official > tested > opinion), 4 creator firsthand tests (Nate Herk, Instantly, Brock Mesarich, Peter Yang), and both vendors' official prompting guides. Lead-magnet guide covers a spec sheet, an 8-aspect breakdown, which-model-for-which-job, 6 long ready-to-run prompts, and self-run evals. CTA keyword: WIN. Sophiya's voice + build, posted on Taha (dual-brand). Other deliverables: claude.ai artifacts v1 (2f37bdd3) + v2 (7c4516f0). Uses the 5.87s fast GIF. IMPORTANT: the Notion guide must be Shared-to-Web for commenters to open the lead-magnet link.
